issues.sample: Water pump failed at under 60k, but was just over 60k miles when I brought into Toyota Dealer (Rudy Luther, Minnetonka MN). Toyota denied claim and won’t stand behind a water pump failure. This part doesn’t have any maintenance needed per manufacture documentation within the mile

narrative.headline: What 2021 Toyota Land Cruiser owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Unknown Or Other (100% of reports).
